channel.title: Untagged on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Untagged on Arrans github.io

item.title: josephmisiti/awesome-machine-learning
item.description: A curated list of awesome Machine Learning frameworks, libraries and software.

item.title: cline/cline
item.description: Autonomous coding agent right in your IDE, capable of creating/editing files, executing commands, using the browser, and more with your permission every step of the way.

item.title: martanne/dvtm
item.description: dvtm brings the concept of tiling window management, popularized by X11-window managers like dwm to the console. As a console window manager it tries to make it easy to work with multiple console based programs.

item.description: Create book from markdown files. Like Gitbook but implemented in Rust
